flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 62% at Redlands Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (857 vs 2.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Redlands Community College fell 25% between 2006 and 2009 (2.2k → 1.7k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Redlands Community College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (71.9% → 60.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Redlands Community College fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (19.6% → 16.8%).
